extraction.one_line_summary: FUGLSANG Jakob won from lead group sprint after ARU Fabio's 8km solo attack absorbed, with BARDET/CONTADOR losing over 1 minute on Montée de la Môndaz.
tactical_patterns: BARDET Roman initiated early chase before Mâcherand climb but couldn't sustain through 10% gradient finale, losing 50 seconds.
ARU Fabio's 8km attack on 10% slopes neutralized by FROOME group despite dropping VALVERDE and intermediate escapees.
ASTANA placed two riders (FUGLSANG, ARU) in winning group despite ARU being nominal leader, revealing planned dual-threat strategy.

rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: positive: outsprinted Tour favorites after working for ARU earlier, suggesting hidden finishing speed post-mountain effort
rider_signals.BARDET Roman: negative: initiated chase but cracked on 10% slopes of Môndaz climb, losing 50 seconds to main contenders
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: negative: lost 1:06 on 10% finale, worst among GC contenders, signaling major weakness on steep gradients
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: neutral: strong solo attack 8km out but caught by FROOME group, then lacked sprint to capitalize
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: attacked first but quickly overtaken by ARU, unable to follow pace on steepest section
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: matched FROOME on climb and took yellow jersey via time bonus in sprint
